purpose: Declared B3 conditionality hypotheses. Each entry is one arrow-stratum x moderator contrast whose predicted sign follows from Part A: an arrow should strengthen in the ecological direction that moves the mixed-partial sign. Predictions are pre-registered here; contrary results are findings, never recoded.

hypotheses.label: d_A_display_stronger_where_pollination_generalized
hypotheses.rationale: Antagonist tracking of attractive display should be stronger under generalized pollination, raising d_A toward the complementarity regime.

hypotheses.label: d_A_scent_stronger_under_high_florivore_pressure
hypotheses.rationale: Where florivore pressure is high, scent-mediated attraction of antagonists should produce a more positive A->antagonism effect.

hypotheses.label: c_D_barrier_more_costly_under_strong_access_restriction
hypotheses.rationale: Stronger morphological access restriction should make the barrier's pollination cost more negative, pushing toward the substitutability regime.
